untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ranking stocks by prior calendar-year returns (decile ranking and comparative analysis across universe) and filtering by market cap (small-cap classification). The allowed indicators only support single-security analysis with technical/price metrics. Cross-sectional ranking, decile-based filtering, and market-cap-based universe selection are not expressible with the available indicator set. Additionally, precise January calendar-date triggering is not directly supported in the indicator framework.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using returns metric as proxy for worst prior-year performers, with conservative threshold of -30% annual return. Used 31-day hold window as proxy for January seasonal window. However, this fundamentally cannot capture the intended signal: (1) worst decile ranking requires relative universe ranking; (2) small-cap filter requires market-cap screening; (3) January-specific entry requires calendar-based logic. Recommend implementing this as a separate fundamental/universe filter outside the technical backtest engine.
